tips_en: Start with Paper 3 (Ring-2.5-1T-Zero) for its broadest insights on emergent reasoning at trillion-parameter scale, then read Paper 1 (LongStraw) since both explore RL training challenges—Paper 3 from a data/loss perspective and Paper 1 from a GPU memory perspective. Paper 2 (Function-aware FIM) is more specialized for coding-agent training and can be read independently if you're working on agentic LLMs.
tips_zh: 建议先读第三篇（Ring-2.5-1T-Zero），它对万亿参数规模下涌现推理能力的探讨最为广泛；接着读第一篇（LongStraw），因为两篇都涉及强化学习训练的挑战——第三篇从数据/损失角度切入，第一篇从GPU显存角度切入。如果你专注于智能体方向的LLM训练，第二篇（Function-aware FIM）可以独立阅读，它更专注于编码智能体这一特定领域。
